_note: Copy to config.json and adjust. Names/SQL must match your real state — verify before enabling. This tool's value is DB-level + host checks that uptime monitors miss.

checks.name: app pg_cron jobs
checks._note: List the jobnames from cron.job that MUST stay active. stale_after_hours flags a job that hasn't run within N hours.

checks.name: orders table freshness
checks._note: Alerts if no new row in N hours — catches a silently dead ingestion job.

checks.name: offsite backup freshness
checks._note: host = an entry in your ~/.ssh/config. Remove 'disabled' once the path is set.

checks.name: container running
checks._note: Passes when the SSH command exits 0.
